overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment with distinctive red architecture, crossing streets, waiting at traffic lights, and passing a security mech. The scene features warm morning sunlight, palm trees, cyberpunk aesthetics, and light vehicular traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with palm trees

events.description: ego crosses the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking toward and crossing the intersection, moving from sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
vertical traffic signal showing red light
modern multi-story building with reflective glass facade
multi-level parking garage with red accent panels

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk toward an intersection. Palm trees and modern buildings frame the scene as the character crosses the street at the crosswalk, with a black car visible driving through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under red transit structure

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath massive red architectural overpass
slows down while approaching the traffic light at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the red overpass structure, approaching the next intersection

entered.detail: massive red structural beams and supports overhead creating partial cover
futuristic white linear light fixture mounted on a tall pole

segments.scene_description: The character enters a distinctive covered walkway defined by massive red structural beams overhead. The lighting shifts to a mix of sunlight and shadow as the character continues forward, approaching a traffic light at the end of the covered section.

events.description: stops and waits at red traffic light at the intersection
red sports car pulls up and stops at the traffic light beside the crosswalk
begins crossing the street as the traffic situation clears

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light, then crossing the street as a red sports car stops at the intersection

notable_agents.action: red sports car approaching and stopping at the traffic light

entered.detail: bright red futuristic sports car with white stripe details

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character waits at a traffic light as vehicles pass. A distinctive red sports car pulls up and stops at the light, and the character then crosses the street, moving away from the red overpass structure.

events.description: approaches security mech and armed guards stationed near red building
security mech activates its lights and shifts position slightly as ego passes

agents.ego_description: walking past the security checkpoint, observing the armed mech and guards

notable_agents.action: large security mech with glowing orange lights and heavy armor standing guard
armed guard in tactical gear standing beside the mech

entered.detail: large bipedal combat mech with black armor and glowing orange visor lights
tall red concrete industrial building with security personnel stationed outside

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a security checkpoint where a massive armed mech stands guard alongside armed personnel. The mech's lights activate as the character passes by the red industrial building, creating a tense atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service walkway along building perimeter

events.description: turns corner and enters narrow shaded walkway beside tall building
emerges from deep shadow back into sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk beside the dark building wall, moving toward the open plaza

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark building facade with vertical architectural lines casting deep shadows
low concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Turning a corner, the character enters a narrow, shadowed walkway running alongside a tall dark building. The lighting drops significantly as the character passes the security checkpoint, walking toward a distant opening where sunlight is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with view of mega tower

events.description: emerges into wide open plaza with clear view of towering skyscraper

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the massive tower, passing modern street furniture and light poles

notable_agents.action: person walking across the plaza in the middle distance

entered.detail: massive cylindrical skyscraper with red and white markings emitting steam from the top
large brutalist building with sloped concrete ramp and industrial vents
tall futuristic lamp posts with horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a vast sunlit plaza dominated by a massive cylindrical tower in the distance. The character continues walking along the wide sidewalk, passing modern street lamps and brutalist architecture while the mega tower looms ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic city that transitions from open urban streets into oppressive security zones before opening into a vast architectural plaza. It begins with the character crossing a bright intersection framed by palm trees and modern buildings, moving steadily forward until the environment shifts into a covered walkway defined by massive red structural beams. As the character exits this shaded overpass and waits at a traffic light beside a red sports car, the scene turns toward a tense security checkpoint guarded by a massive armed mech and personnel. The camera then follows the character into a narrow, shadowed passage alongside a dark building where the light drops significantly, before finally emerging from the gloom into a wide, sunlit plaza dominated by a looming cylindrical mega tower.
